task_completion.description: Weasis application is open and displaying the CT scan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis GUI is visible on screen with a medical image (CT scan) loaded in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Display interpolation is set to 'Nearest' or 'Nearest Neighbor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings panel, context menu, or toolbar in Weasis shows the 'Interpolation' or 'Filter' option explicitly set to 'Nearest' or 'Nearest Neighbor'.

task_completion.description: The image is zoomed in to at least 400%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A zoom indicator in the Weasis viewer (often in the corner of the image or on a toolbar) displays a value of 400% or greater, and the image appears highly magnified.

task_completion.description: An export or save dialog is opened to capture the view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As', 'Export', or 'Capture' dialog box is open over the Weasis interface.

task_completion.description: The image is being exported to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save/export dialog shows the destination folder as 'exports' (inside ~/DICOM/) and the file name exactly as 'nearest_neighbor.png'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Weasis GUI to perform the task rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the Weasis application menus, zoom tools, and export dialogs, rather than terminal windows running image manipulation commands like ImageMagick.

integrity.description: The zoomed-in image genuinely reflects Nearest Neighbor interpolation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The highly zoomed image in the Weasis viewer visibly displays sharp, blocky, raw pixel grids rather than smooth, blurry gradients (which would indicate bilinear/bicubic interpolation).

integrity.description: The export process is genuine and not mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog belongs to the Weasis application or the native OS file picker, and the agent is not just typing the path into a text editor or unrelated application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/DICOM/exports/nearest_neighbor.png. The exported image must exhibit blocky pixels characteristic of Nearest Neighbor interpolation at >400% zoom. This is programmatically verified by checking that the ratio of identical adjacent pixels is >= 0.25.
